author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--improve-gitignore
content: Completed: Added write_root_gitignore() to init.rs with section-marker-based idempotent gitignore management. Covers .crosslink/ machine-local state and .claude/ auto-generated dirs. Updated .crosslink/.gitignore to include integrations/. 8 new tests. All tests pass, clippy clean. Committed as b3d736e.
